plan.caption:
White Flare ETBs sit at $145. Opening one averages $67. That gap is $78.

The math on this one is straightforward.
Sealed EV: $67. Sealed price: $145. Spread: $78 in your favor.
Top pulls if you do rip: Victini at $518, Reshiram ex at $488, Oshawott at $93.
Verdict: Keep it sealed. The premium holds.

pokeev.com tracks the live Expected Value so you always know the number before you decide.
